title: SweechBar AccountsView single provider-tree rebuild
description: Drop the three hard-coded sections (Claude / Codex / External) in AccountsView and rebuild as a single collapsible provider tree. NOT SHIPPED — user explicitly told the agent to STOP this redesign mid-flight ("I did not ask you to redesign the whole THING"). Branch preserved at tag wave6/T-073-keep (commit a5a3f34). Replaced by T-075 (surgical regrouping only, no UI rebuild).

context.text: Implementation complete at tag wave6/T-073-keep: provider-tree AccountsView with seeded preview window for proof capture before T-071 lands. Light + dark mode screenshots saved at ~/Desktop/screenshots/sweech/t073-light-final.png and t073-dark-final.png. Deferred because the user only wanted cosmetic regrouping in the existing two-tab layout — that landed via T-075 instead.

acceptanceCriteria: AccountsView renders one section per provider; legacy Claude/Codex/External hard-coded sections gone
Each provider row shows its kind (OAuth subscription / API-key / Local) as a badge
Each account row shows its credential kind, expiry (if OAuth), and the workspaces it powers
Sort, filter, search, grouping affordances all preserved (no feature drops)
swift build clean; visual proof screenshot saved to PROJECT_SCREENSHOT_DIR after rebuild
Light AND dark mode screenshots both captured
